/usr/bin/ar qc libradcore.a CMakeFiles/radcore.dir/src/radcontroller/sdlcontroller.cpp.o CMakeFiles/radcore.dir/src/raddebugcommunication/targetx.cpp.o /usr/bin/ranlib libradcore.a
